message:
fix(parser): escape embedded double-quotes in QuotedId token rendering

QuotedId::to_sql_string() now doubles embedded double-quotes when
rendering (e.g., `"col""name"` instead of `"col"name"`), matching
the SQL standard escaping convention for quoted identifiers. Without
this fix, a quoted identifier containing a literal double-quote would
produce syntactically invalid SQL when serialized.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -459,7 +459,7 @@ impl TokenKind {
                 hex
             }
             Self::Id(s) | Self::Error(s) => s.clone(),
-            Self::QuotedId(s, _) => format!("\"{s}\""),
+            Self::QuotedId(s, _) => format!("\"{}\"", s.replace('"', "\"\"")),
             Self::Question => "?".to_owned(),
             Self::QuestionNum(n) => format!("?{n}"),
             Self::ColonParam(s) => format!(":{s}"),
